metadata.purpose: Define auditable late-cycle risk inputs before any overlay backtest or parameter selection.

summary.conclusion: The overlay concept is defined, but historical valuation and strict point-in-time lineage are not ready; no overlay result is claimed.

features.definition: Point-in-time broad-index PE/PB and equity-risk-premium percentile over an expanding historical window.
source_candidates: Tushare index_dailybasic or equivalent licensed index valuation history
release-safe bond yield history for ERP
features.current_gap: The current macro history has no PE percentile, PB percentile, or ERP observations.
features.missing_value_policy: null_and_ineligible; never substitute zero or a current observation

features.definition: Cross-industry crowding derived from breadth, persistence, extension, and concentration using only data available by decision close.
features.current_gap: Values exist, but immutable point-in-time universe/version hashes and capture timestamps do not.
features.missing_value_policy: null_and_ineligible; never substitute zero or a current observation

features.definition: Share of market turnover concentrated in the leading industries, compared with its expanding historical distribution.
source_candidates: SW2021 constituent or industry turnover aggregation
features.current_gap: top_industry_ratio is a strength-score ratio, not turnover concentration, and must not be used as a silent substitute.
features.missing_value_policy: null_and_ineligible; never substitute zero or a current observation

features.definition: Divergence between broad-index trend/price highs and cross-industry or constituent participation breadth.
source_candidates: SW2021 L1 or constituent advance/decline breadth
features.current_gap: Breadth proxies exist, but early dates are incomplete and historical source snapshots are not versioned.
features.missing_value_policy: null_and_ineligible; never substitute zero or a current observation

features.definition: Derived explanatory composite requiring a point-in-time late-cycle phase plus elevated valuation or crowding evidence.
features.current_gap: No formula or threshold may be selected until all components pass point-in-time lineage checks.
features.missing_value_policy: null_and_ineligible; never substitute zero or a current observation

features.definition: Drawdown occurring from a historically high valuation/crowding state, separated from an early- or mid-cycle pullback.
features.current_gap: Drawdown is available, but the high-level qualifier is not auditable without the late-cycle inputs.
features.missing_value_policy: null_and_ineligible; never substitute zero or a current observation

reduce_risk_only_when: strict point-in-time phase indicates late cycle
valuation or crowding/concentration evidence is elevated
a drawdown or breadth divergence confirms deterioration
intended_research_logic.do_not_reduce_for: An early- or mid-bull pullback without high-level valuation/crowding evidence.
intended_research_logic.output_before_backtest: explanatory eligibility flags only; no percentage exposure or trade action
intended_research_logic.thresholds: unset; must be specified before preregistered out-of-sample testing

readiness_gate.minimum_coverage_policy: to be preregistered; not selected in V15.5
